title: Which artbook contains these pictures
wikitext:
[]: Which artbook contains these pictures?             Quote Post by fearlubu » Mon Jun 14, 2010 9:17 pm hmm how to describe it....its the ones with Shinji, Rei, maya, Asuka, Misato, and kaworu all gothic-looking and stuff http://miotd.com/2008/03/23/evangelion-gothic-rei/ ^like so

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jun 14, 2010 9:20 pm Those are from the 2008 Evangelion calendar.
